3037960.name: GT Racing 1980
3037960.description:
GT Racing 1980 brings you the feel and frenetic energy of the great top down racing games from the 80's and 90's but updates those mechanics and combines them with real car physics to give a much deeper driving experience.

  • Race in cars inspired by the most iconic cars of the 80's. Upgrade and modify them to increase performance but more importantly to suit your driving style, so you can compete with the best drivers in each Division.

  • Battle through 3 divisions against charismatic drivers to make your way become Division 1 Champion.

  • Meet and race your rivals in unique races which give unique rewards including exclusive car liveries.

  • Compete in special invitational races, with strict requirements on which cars can enter.

  • Race against friends in 2 player split screen mode.

  • With Free Practice and Time Attack modes available to help you hone your skills, there's lots of content to keep you coming back.

  • And, if you can find it - you can unlock the GYM mode, to really showcase your skills!
3037960.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
